summary: Completed frontend testing of new Courses of Action functionality. All core features working correctly including collapsible sections, navigation flows, confirmation dialogs, and payment methods display.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test 'VIEW COURSES OF ACTION' button from Results page without completing full user flow (account creation → profile → search)
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior due to React routing protection, not a bug

passed_tests: Courses of Action page loads with two collapsible sections (Criminal and Civil)
Criminal Course of Action expands correctly showing description and red action button
Civil Course of Action expands correctly showing description and green action button
Criminal action button triggers confirmation dialog with proper messaging
Confirmation dialog 'Yes, I Confirm' button navigates to Self-Surrender page
Self-Surrender page displays bench warrant warning prominently
Civil action button navigates directly to Payment Methods page (no dialog)
Payment Methods page displays all 5 required payment options: Debit/Credit Cards, Federal Bonding Kiosk, MoneyPak Voucher, Electronic ePayments, Federal Direct Transfer
All payment method buttons are clickable and properly styled
Navigation between pages works correctly with proper URL routing
